parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ type: $json.parsed.type, title: $json.parsed.title, amount: $json.parsed.amount || null, currency: $json.parsed.currency || null, person: $json.parsed.person || null, project: $json.parsed.project || null, event_datetime: $json.parsed.event_datetime || null, due_datetime: $json.parsed.due_datetime || null, status: $json.parsed.status || 'open', metadata: $json.parsed.metadata || {}, raw_text: $json.original.raw_text, transcript: $json.original.transcript, telegram_chat_id: $json.original.telegram_chat_id, telegram_message_id: $json.original.telegram_message_id, audio_file_id: $json.original.voice_file_id, source: 'telegram', source_type: $json.original.source_type }) }}
